defs: Unfortunate event or issue of an undertaking; failure to attain a proper or desired result or reach a destination; as, a serious miscarriage of justice.
quotes: When a counselor, to save himself, Would lay miscarriages upon his prince.

defs: Ill conduct; evil or improper behavior; as, the failings and miscarriages of the righteous.
The act of bringing forth a child before the time it is viable; a premature birth, resulting in death of the fetus; spontaneous abortion.
